title: eperotao #1905
definition:
1) to accost one with an enquiry, put a question to, enquiry of,
    ask, interrogate
 2) to address one with a request or demand
    2a) to ask of or demand of one
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to accost one with an enquiry, put a question to, enquiry of,
    ask, interrogate
 2) to address one with a request or demand
    2a) to ask of or demand of one

    NASB:  to inquire of:
